features.heading: Why ReviewHub?
features.subtitle: We're building the most honest and comprehensive review platform on the web.
features.timelineDesc: Track how products hold up over time. Update your review at 1 month, 1 year, and beyond.
features.mediaDesc: Upload photos to show real-world usage. A picture is worth a thousand words.
features.communityDesc: Engage with other reviewers. Ask questions and share experiences in comments.
features.trustedDesc: Join a growing community of honest reviewers. Build your reputation as a trusted voice.
features.ratingsDesc: Rate products on multiple criteria. Help others make informed decisions.
features.verifiedDesc: All reviews are from real users. No fake reviews, no paid promotions.
